parsed.production_notes: The character's face exhibits uncanny valley characteristics with perfectly smooth skin and slightly unnatural lip-syncing. The background is completely static and the lighting is artificially soft and flawless.

characters.appearance: Middle-aged woman with a fair complexion and reddish-brown hair pulled back. She has smooth skin, bright eyes, and a friendly, approachable look.
characters.wardrobe: A simple, solid grey turtleneck sweater.

scenes.setting: A plain, soft, out-of-focus brown/grey background.

panels.panel_visual_description: A close-up shot of Character A looking directly at the camera. She is smiling and appears to be speaking. Her right hand occasionally comes up to rest gently under her chin. The background is a completely plain, soft, out-of-focus brown/grey color. The lighting is soft, even, and flattering, highlighting her facial features without harsh shadows.
A solid, plain light beige background with no other visual elements.

scenes.visual_description: The screen is split horizontally. The top half features a close-up of Character A speaking directly to the viewer against a soft background. The bottom half is a solid light beige area where a scrolling transcript of her speech is displayed, with words highlighting as they are spoken. A thin progress bar is visible at the very top of the screen.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: If you're over 50 and think you'll never speak English - you're wrong!
Character A says: You just need to practice everyday, and that's exactly what I'm here for. I'm Loora, your AI English tutor.
Character A says: With me, you can practice anytime, anywhere, just like you would with a real person.
Character A says: I'll chat with you, provide instant feedback on your pronunciation, and help you improve with every conversation.
Character A says: It's fast, easy, and pressure-free. You don't have to worry about making mistakes because I'll guide you through them.
Character A says: Let's practice together every day, and you'll see how quickly your English improves.
scenes.on_screen_text:
If you're over 50 and think you'll never speak English - you're wrong!
You just need to practice everyday, and that's exactly what I'm here for. I'm Loora, your AI English tutor.
With me, you can practice anytime, anywhere, just like you would with a real person.
I'll chat with you, provide instant feedback on your pronunciation, and help you improve with every conversation. It's fast, easy, and pressure-free. You don't have to worry about making mistakes because I'll guide you through them.
Let's practice together every day, and you'll see how quickly your English improves.
